# HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform&lt;TState&gt;

- Package: `HPD-ML-Abstractions` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Kind: `interface`

Stateful transform: ordered input, state carried across rows, one output per input. Used for time series, sliding windows, running aggregations.

```csharp

```
